# velia_customer_contact (Data Source)

Reads a customer contact from Velia.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "velia_customer_contact" "test" {
  id = "123"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Numeric customer contact ID.

### Read-Only

- `email` (String) Customer contact email address.
- `type` (String) Customer contact type, for example billing or technical.
